title: The Straw Hats Break Through Totto Land
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Jinbe as The Straw Hats break through Big Mom’s encirclement as allies buy time and Luffy’s fight reaches its conclusion.
scene: Luffy escapes the mirror world while Jinbe, Germa, and the Sun Pirates help the crew break through Big Mom’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We're inside of Madat- Sumi's mouth.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As if I'd let you get away, you fishman!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Get out of here, you guys!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Straw hat!! I...! I did bad things... on fishman island...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then I was taken in by boss jinbe... even though I did all those things...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: F-For that, I am so thankful....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The moment we decided to come help big boss and straw hat...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ...Is when we made up our minds!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Mama is the type of person that would kill any- body who tries to leave this country.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ...In other words, all we can do...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Is act as Captain jinbe's shield and die in the process?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: gyahaha!! We can't all die. Somebody has to live to tell the tale.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...I WON'T _LAME ANYBODY WHO WANTS TO ESCAPE...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: But for those who want to stay...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Jinbe's departure on his new voyage!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: every- one made up their minds!!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Finale storyline with 37 dialogue beats. The crew escapes Totto Land through the sacrifices and timing of Jinbe, Germa, and the Sun Pirates.
